initiatives.name: Indianapolis Liberation Center
initiatives.description: Community space connecting struggles of Indy's oppressed, marginalized, and exploited through mutual aid, education, and organizing.

initiatives.name: FOCUS Initiatives
initiatives.description: Forever On Course, United In Solidarity - Community-led re-entry program supporting formerly incarcerated people through housing, mutual aid, and solidarity.

initiatives.name: Beyond Barcodes Bookstore
initiatives.description: A Black-owned bookstore fostering mutual aid and community power through literature, cultural programming, and community building in Indianapolis. They coordinate book access, educational events, and solidarity networks while building power through Black literature, community dialogue, and creating spaces for cultural empowerment and connection.

initiatives.name: Mutual Aid Over Everything
initiatives.description: A grassroots collective fostering community care through direct mutual aid and resource distribution in Indianapolis. They coordinate emergency assistance, material support, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing, direct action, and creating spaces for sustainable community support systems.

initiatives.name: Indianapolis Food Not Bombs
initiatives.description: Feeding vegan food to homeless people every Sunday.

initiatives.name: Circle City Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: Circle City Mutual Aid (ccma) is an autonomous collective of Indianapolis residents dedicated to sharing skills + resources, building community through outreach, and developing relationships with our neighbors.

initiatives.name: Heater Bloc Indy
initiatives.description: Here to help each other survive! Winter project page based in Indianapolis.

initiatives.name: Good Neighbors Indy
initiatives.description: GNMA is a volunteer community action collective for those doing outreach to support our unhoused neighbors and doing direct encampment outreach.

initiatives.name: Indy for Gaza
initiatives.description: Join us in our fight for justice and human rights in Gaza. Together, we can make a difference by advocating for an immediate ceasefire, pushing for humanitarian aid, and holding our representatives accountable.

initiatives.name: Indy Mask Bloc
initiatives.description: Distributing free masks and other protective supplies in the ongoing airborne pandemics

initiatives.name: Community Food Box Project
initiatives.description: First little pantries in Indiana. 83 locations providing 24 hour access to non-perishable food items.

initiatives.name: Resist and Abolish the Stigma (RATS)
initiatives.description: Providing safer-use supplies to those experiencing houselessness.
